# Sigil

Sigil is a merge policy engine for agent-generated pull requests. It turns markdown specs into sealed CI evaluations and returns ALLOW, REVIEW, or BLOCK.

## Product

- Overview: https://runsigil.com/
- How it works: https://runsigil.com/how/
- About: https://runsigil.com/about/
- Contact: https://runsigil.com/contact/
- Privacy: https://runsigil.com/privacy/

## Getting Started

- Quickstart: https://runsigil.com/quickstart/
- Installation: https://runsigil.com/installation/
- GitHub Actions integration: https://runsigil.com/integrations/github-actions/

## Concepts

- Dark Factory: https://runsigil.com/concepts/dark-factory/
- Trust Model: https://runsigil.com/concepts/trust-model/
- Invariants: https://runsigil.com/concepts/invariants/
- Ledger: https://runsigil.com/concepts/ledger/
- Fit and Limitations: https://runsigil.com/concepts/fit-limitations/

## Guides

- Writing Scenarios: https://runsigil.com/guides/writing-scenarios/
- CI Integration: https://runsigil.com/guides/ci-integration/
- Configuring Judges: https://runsigil.com/guides/configuring-judges/

- Lua DSL: https://runsigil.com/reference/lua-dsl/
